creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
The error below shows up whil installing port graphics/qgis when GRASS is enabled:

make showconfig

===> The following configuration options are available for qgis-2.18.12_1:
     PYTHON=on: Python bindings or support
     POSTGIS=on: PostGIS geographic support for PostgreSQL
     GRASS=on: Geographic Information System (GIS) support
     SERVER=off: Enable QGIS server
====> Options available for the group DEVELOPER
     CUSTOMWIDGETS=off: Enable QT4/QGis Custom Widgets
     ASTYLE=off: Enable AStyle for QGis
     TESTS=off: Run the test suite after build process
     DEBUG=off: Write Debugging Output to Console
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings

The problem is also present in poudriere as well as installing/compiling sources


[...]
install  -m 0644 /usr/ports/graphics/qgis/work/QGIS-final-2_18_12/debian/qgis-icon512x512.png  /usr/ports/graphics/qgis/work/stage/usr/local/share/icons/hicolor/512x512/apps/qgis.png
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===>  Installing for qgis-2.18.12_1
===>   Registering installation for qgis-2.18.12_1
